description: Daily revenue batch summarizing gross revenue by park unit and revenue category. Aggregated into monthly fiscal periods upon receipt by SGF.
notes: Known 2-5% timing divergence between VistaReserve daily totals and SGF monthly aggregations.

description: Weekly export of customer email addresses for marketing campaigns. Email service is a downstream consumer only and is not inventoried as a primary data source.
Statewide payroll disbursement feed. DCR does not control this integration — it is managed by the state Department of Human Resources.
notes: Payroll transactions flow through SGF as part of a statewide automated feed covering all state agencies.

description: Manual cross-reference of SGF appropriation codes and encumbrance numbers when reconciling grant expenditures.
notes: 2-5% reconciliation gap attributed to timing differences and coding discipline variance.

description: Manual copy-paste of volunteer hour totals from park-level spreadsheets and VolunTracker SaaS for in-kind match calculations.
notes: No automated data feed. Individual contributions may be listed as multiple parties in a single cell.

description: One-time baseline asset inventory load in 2020. GIS feature data and coordinates used to seed the initial InfraTrak asset registry for Regions 1-2. No ongoing synchronization.
notes: Crosswalk between GeoParks feature IDs and InfraTrak asset tags has not been maintained since 2022.

description: Cached copy of simplified map data refreshed quarterly for VistaReserve's public-facing reservation map widget.
notes: Simplified and cached — not a live feed of full GIS data.

description: Criminal justice network feed providing warrant checks and criminal history lookups for sworn officers. Inbound to RangerShield only.
notes: External to DCR. Managed by state DOJ. CJIS-compliant network.

description: Quarterly manual data entry of Uniform Crime Report statistics into the state reporting authority's system.
notes: Manual data entry process — not an automated feed.

description: Ad hoc manual compilation of sanitized incident summaries for executive leadership. Delivered as static PDFs or printed memoranda.
notes: 2-4 week reporting lag. Aggregated and sanitized to satisfy CJIS constraints.

description: Partial manual crosswalk spreadsheet mapping legacy site IDs to current VistaReserve IDs. Covers 15 highest-volume parks only. Created by a seasonal analyst in 2022.
notes: Unversioned standalone spreadsheet on shared drive. Not formally stewarded. Covers only 30% of legacy parks.

description: Asset crosswalk table nominally links VistaReserve inventory IDs to InfraTrak asset tags. Created during 2021 implementation but not maintained since 2022.
notes: Incomplete for assets added or reclassified after 2022.

description: Same asset crosswalk table links VistaReserve inventory IDs to GeoParks feature IDs. Stale since 2022.
notes: Part of the three-way crosswalk (VistaReserve-InfraTrak-GeoParks) that has drifted.

description: Asset crosswalk table links InfraTrak asset tags to GeoParks feature IDs. Same stale crosswalk.
notes: Three-way crosswalk covering VistaReserve-InfraTrak-GeoParks. Unmaintained since 2022.

description: BioSurvey survey_sites.park_id uses the same INTEGER park_id space as VistaReserve and InfraTrak but has no FK enforcement. Post-2011 records include GPS coordinates that can be manually overlaid on GeoParks spatial layers.
notes: Manual GIS overlay — not an automated integration. Pre-2011 records lack coordinates.

description: SGF expenditures and InfraTrak work order costs represent the same spending at different granularity levels. SGF tracks by object code (no asset attribution); InfraTrak tracks by asset. Reconciliation is manual using date and dollar matching.
notes: No common key between systems. Manual reconciliation is error-prone. Applies only to Regions 1-2 where InfraTrak is deployed.

description: Annual formatted Excel export of endangered species monitoring data submitted as a compliance obligation.
notes: Maintained by Chief Biologist. Required for state Endangered Species Act compliance.

description: Summer-season manual transcription of beach water quality test results into the state health department's web portal.
notes: Manual data entry for designated public swimming beaches only.

description: Annual export of condition assessment scores as static PDF for inclusion in legislative budget request packages.
notes: No live data feed. Static PDF export only.

description: PeopleFirst organizational hierarchy is used to determine access control roles in VistaReserve. Linkage is maintained through manual access request processes — not automated identity provisioning.
notes: No automated feed. Manual process for role assignment.

description: PeopleFirst organizational hierarchy is used to determine access control roles in InfraTrak. Same manual process as VistaReserve.
notes: No automated feed. Manual process for role assignment.
